top_signals.title: Stocks Rally as Trump Signals Iran Deal, Oil Slips: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A rally in Wall Street stocks extended into Asia after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran, raising hopes for a diplomatic end to the conflict. Oil dropped.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices fall on hopes of U.S.-Iran deal despite Tehran pushback
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell on Friday after U.S. President Donald Trump said Washington had reached a framework agreement with Iran, raising hopes that tensions in the Middle East could ease.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Donald Trump says US close to deal with Iran and calls off strikes
top_signals.summary: Markets rally and oil prices dip as US president claims agreement will reopen Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Sanctions Cuban State Oil Company
top_signals.summary: The United States issued sanctions against Cuban state oil company Union Cuba Petroleo (CUPET), the Treasury Department website showed on Thursday, adding more obstacles for the island's government to import much-needed fuel.Washington has imposed sanctions on an array of Cuban entities and people…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Iran war adds to AI boom as demand for gas turbines rises further, Siemens Energy says - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Iran war adds to AI boom as demand for gas turbines rises further, Siemens Energy says  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Public asked to help select UK wildlife to appear on new banknote series
top_signals.summary: The public are being asked to give their views on a selection of wildlife, native to the UK, that will appear on the next series of banknotes in a consultation launched today.
